subcodes.first_line: O blessed leaf! Praise thou God that thou art sprung from the sacred Tree and art associated with His hallowed Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مبارکه حمد کن خدا را که از سدره مبارکه روایدی و منتسب عتبه مقدسه ای
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @importance of prayer, @praise and encouragement
